title: Campfire Fixes
description: Removes campfire ashes when a campfire is not lit , fixes the positioning of the top logs so that they are the same height as slabs, and changes outer side textures.
body:
![About](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19d332cdab77737cd016fd7c1ae13efef260cbc7_0.webp)

**Campfire Fixes** removes the ashes from a campfire when it is not lit, changes the positioning of the top logs to be raised by one pixel, making it the same height as slabs, and removes the outer side textures of the top logs and replaces them with the regular campfire log texture.
